patch_history.raw: Viper's Pit Chemical cloud has been updated to be more consistent in the way it spreads around map geometry. v
Viper's Pit Fixed a bug where it was only showing inconsistent VFX when an observer was on freecam within it. v
Poison Cloud Fixed an issue where throw animations would break if aiming straight down v
Snake Bite Fixed a bug where the visual effects didn’t fade at the same time for allies and enemies Viper's Pit Fixed a bug that caused it to linger in front of you when unequipped without casting v
Toxin Initial contact Decay reduced from 30 >>> 10 health v

patch_history.raw: Toxic Screen Fixed a bug where Toxic Screen could have small gaps around ground level in specific map locations v
Fixed a bug where Toxic Screen and Poison Cloud would sometimes disappear from the minimap v

Removed delay on Toxic Screen and Poison Cloud disabling when Viper is suppressed Added a unique VO line that plays when Toxic Screen or Poison Cloud are disabled by suppress Toxic Screen and Poison Cloud emitters now have yellow lights to indicate when the abilities are on cooldown Fuel Fuel drain increased 50% when Toxic Screen and Poison Cloud are both active. Fuel bar now turns red when Viper does not have enough to activate her abilities. patch_history.raw: Viper's Pit Fixed an exploit where, using specific line-ups, it was possible to see inside the pit without being affected by the nearsighted debuff Fixed a bug where the pit would sometimes fail to expand through doorways v

Poison Cloud Updated the visuals for the dissolving effect seen within the smoke to better match the visuals seen from the outside, in an attempt to remove any type of peeker’s advantage when playing from within the smoke Toxic Screen Passing through the highest portion now correctly applies instant decay to high-flying Agents v
Poison Cloud Fixed a bug where concurrent, overlapping ally and enemy Poison Clouds could cause the nearsight and decay to never remove v
Fuel Fuel will no longer continue to drain after Toxic Screen or Poison Cloud go down if Viper is suppressed right as she activates them v

patch_history.raw: Viper's Pit Reverted an accidentally shipped bug that caused Viper's Pit to start forming at the cursor placement point instead of around Viper v
Snake Bite Duration reduced 8 >>> 6.5 Cost increased 100 >>> 200 Outer edges form faster to ensure it is lethal if an enemy sits in the entire duration v

patch_history.raw: Poison Cloud Fixed Poison Cloud pickup distance being 200 instead of the intended 400 Toxic Screen Fixed Toxic Screen going longer than intended when it passed through the teleporter on Bind v

Toxin Fixed a bug when calculating if damage taken while decayed should be lethal for players with armor Most noticeably, this was causing Marshal shots when the target was decayed 50 to reduce the enemy to 1 health instead of killing them v

Fixed unintentional delay when deactivating Poison Cloud or Toxic Screen Toxin Now instantly inflicts 50 HP Decay on initial contact Decay over time decreased 15 HP/sec >>> 10 HP/sec HP regen delay once no longer affected by Toxin decreased 2.5 seconds >>> 1.5 seconds Snake Bite Equip time decreased 1.1 >>> .8 Poison Cloud Held charge is now temporary if gained from picking up a placed emitter and will not carry over to the next round Can now immediately be redeployed when picked up Pickup distance increased 200 >>> 400 If active when Viper dies, Poison Cloud now remains up for an additional 2 seconds, or until Viper runs out of fuel. Toxic Screen If active when Viper dies, Toxic Screen now remains up for an additional 2 seconds before deactivating Full blind distance from the wall increas
